zh.lifeSummary: Sir Elidyr Ddû是Elidir ap Rhys和Gwladus ferch Philip的兒子，於1250年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安迪洛法福。他於1315年與Cecil ferch Sitsyllt在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在威爾士。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Elidyr Ddû是Elidir ap Rhys和Gwladus ferch Philip的儿子，于1250年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安迪洛法福。他于1315年与Cecil ferch Sitsyllt在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: Ddû
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 竇, meaning ‘hole’ in ancient Chinese: (i) adopted as a surname by Yue Zhu and Yue Long, two sons of Shao Kang, the sixth king of the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). Yue Zhu and Yue Long are said to have adopted Dou (竇) (meaning ‘hole’) as a surname because their pregnant grandmother had escaped from a rebellion through a hole in the wall before giving birth to their father, Shao Kang, who later recaptured the throne. (ii) traced back to the Dou (竇) family from the Di ethnic group and some other families from the Xianbei ethnic group in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 豆, denoting an ancient stemmed cup of bowl: (i) traced back to some inhabitants in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) adopted as the surname by the Chi Xiao Dou (赤小豆) and Dou Lu (豆盧) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 鈄, referring to a type of ancient vessel for drinking wine: said to be borne by the descendants of the Duke Kang of Qi (died 379  BC ), who was ousted from his throne in the state of Qi and sent into exile. It was said that he was forced to use the vessel Dou (鈄) to cook food during his exile, and some of his descendants inherited Dou as the surname to memorize this period.

variants.name: Dau
meanings: Now used as a pet form of David , but originally of distinct origin, probably from an Old Celtic word dei ‘to shine’. See also Dewi .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Elidyr Ddû was born in 1250, in Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Elidir ap Rhys and Gwladus ferch Philip. He married Cecil ferch Sitsyllt in 1315, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Elidyr Ddû est né en 1250, à Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils d’Elidir ap Rhys et Gwladus ferch Philip. Il a épousé Cecil ferch Sitsyllt en 1315, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Elidyr Ddû wurde 1250 in Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Elidir ap Rhys und Gwladus ferch Philip geboren. Er hat 1315 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Cecil ferch Sitsyllt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Elidyr Ddûは1250年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランデロファウルでElidir ap RhysとGwladus ferch Philipの息子として生まれた。1315年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでCecil ferch Sitsylltと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼はウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Elidyr Ddû(은)는 1250년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디로파르에서 Elidir ap Rhys(와)과 Gwladus ferch Philip의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1315년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Cecil ferch Sitsyllt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 웨일스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Elidyr Ddû родился в 1250 г. в местности лландилофар, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Elidir ap Rhys и Gwladus ferch Philip. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecil ferch Sitsyllt в 1315 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Elidyr Ddû nació en 1250, en Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Elidir ap Rhys y Gwladus ferch Philip. Se casó con Cecil ferch Sitsyllt en 1315, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en Gales.
